## Summary

Describe the change in one or two paragraphs.

## Why

Explain the problem being solved and why this approach was chosen.

## Validation

List the commands you ran, for example:

```bash
cargo fmt --all --check
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
cargo test
```

## Scope Check

- [ ] no unrelated refactor included
- [ ] docs updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] tests added or updated when needed
- [ ] limitations and risks described honestly

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
